prompt: Outfit: a fitted ivory-cream short-sleeve inner top in fine cotton-blend stretch knit, featuring a close shallow mock neckline and regular upper-arm-length sleeves worn fully down without folding or rolling, layered completely beneath a beige and light-brown sleeveless pinafore mini dress in medium-light suiting-like woven fabric with a fine micro-check pattern and sparse tiny ivory dot-like embellishments, featuring broad shoulder sections worn evenly in their normal position, a structurally deep symmetrical V-shaped front opening extending into the upper torso and exposing a long narrow inverted-triangle section of the cream inner top, a clean semi-fitted elongated bodice, a low dropped-waist seam, a short matching fabric tab with a small rectangular buckle-like detail fixed flat against one side of the front waist, and a mid-thigh pleated mini skirt formed from multiple crisp vertical knife pleats, with no visible front buttons, zipper, hooks, ribbon, belt, or drawstrings and no shoulder slippage, neckline shifting, hem folding, waistband rolling, or asymmetrical styling, the inner top hem fully concealed inside the dress, paired with cream vertical-rib knit knee-high socks pulled evenly to just below both knees without folded cuffs and with only subtle natural bunching around the ankles, black chunky closed-toe loafers in smooth leather-like material featuring rounded apron toes, kiltie-style instep fringe, fixed gold-tone horsebit-like hardware, and thick black lugged rubber platform soles, plus a small-to-medium vertically proportioned natural-ivory canvas shoulder tote with dark-brown leather-like edging, reinforced trim, and one long narrow functional shoulder strap, worn from one shoulder so the bag hangs at the hip rather than crossbody or handheld, with no bag charms or decorative keychains, accompanied only by a minimal random mix of delicate understated metal-tone accessories with very light visual volume, with premium fabric texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, visible seams, refined edge finishing, natural seam tension, believable fabric weight, crisp but realistic pleat structure, subtle wrinkles, real folds, realistic layered depth, natural fabric bunching, believable buckle and metal-hardware construction, high-quality material feel, and well-made everyday clothing details, not costume-like and not cheap-looking.
promptEn: Outfit: a fitted ivory-cream short-sleeve inner top in fine cotton-blend stretch knit, featuring a close shallow mock neckline and regular upper-arm-length sleeves worn fully down without folding or rolling, layered completely beneath a beige and light-brown sleeveless pinafore mini dress in medium-light suiting-like woven fabric with a fine micro-check pattern and sparse tiny ivory dot-like embellishments, featuring broad shoulder sections worn evenly in their normal position, a structurally deep symmetrical V-shaped front opening extending into the upper torso and exposing a long narrow inverted-triangle section of the cream inner top, a clean semi-fitted elongated bodice, a low dropped-waist seam, a short matching fabric tab with a small rectangular buckle-like detail fixed flat against one side of the front waist, and a mid-thigh pleated mini skirt formed from multiple crisp vertical knife pleats, with no visible front buttons, zipper, hooks, ribbon, belt, or drawstrings and no shoulder slippage, neckline shifting, hem folding, waistband rolling, or asymmetrical styling, the inner top hem fully concealed inside the dress, paired with cream vertical-rib knit knee-high socks pulled evenly to just below both knees without folded cuffs and with only subtle natural bunching around the ankles, black chunky closed-toe loafers in smooth leather-like material featuring rounded apron toes, kiltie-style instep fringe, fixed gold-tone horsebit-like hardware, and thick black lugged rubber platform soles, plus a small-to-medium vertically proportioned natural-ivory canvas shoulder tote with dark-brown leather-like edging, reinforced trim, and one long narrow functional shoulder strap, worn from one shoulder so the bag hangs at the hip rather than crossbody or handheld, with no bag charms or decorative keychains, accompanied only by a minimal random mix of delicate understated metal-tone accessories with very light visual volume, with premium fabric texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, visible seams, refined edge finishing, natural seam tension, believable fabric weight, crisp but realistic pleat structure, subtle wrinkles, real folds, realistic layered depth, natural fabric bunching, believable buckle and metal-hardware construction, high-quality material feel, and well-made everyday clothing details, not costume-like and not cheap-looking.
promptZh: 服装：一件修身的象牙奶油色短袖内搭，采用精细棉混纺弹力针织面料，配有贴合的浅圆领，袖长至上臂，穿着时袖口平整，不折叠或卷起；外搭一件米色与浅棕色无袖背带迷你裙，采用中轻量西装质感织物，带有细微的微格纹图案和稀疏的微小象牙色圆点装饰，肩带平整地位于正常位置，前部为结构感深对称 V 领，露出内搭长条倒三角形区域，修身长款上衣剪裁，低腰线设计，腰部一侧固定有同材质短饰带及小型矩形扣环细节，裙摆为大腿中部的百褶迷你裙，由多个利落的垂直刀褶组成，无可见的前扣、拉链、挂钩、丝带、腰带或抽绳，无肩带滑落、领口移位、下摆折叠、腰带卷曲或不对称造型，内搭下摆完全塞入裙内；搭配奶油色垂直罗纹针织过膝袜，均匀拉至双膝下方，无翻边，脚踝处仅有轻微的自然褶皱；黑色厚底包头乐福鞋，采用光滑皮革质感材料，圆头设计，配有流苏装饰、固定的金色马衔扣五金件以及厚实的黑色橡胶锯齿厚底；另配有一个中小型垂直比例的天然象牙色帆布单肩托特包，带有深棕色皮革质感包边、加固饰边及一条细长功能性肩带，单肩背负使包袋垂于臀部位置，而非斜挎或手提，无包挂或装饰性钥匙扣；仅搭配少量极简、低调的金属色配饰，视觉量感极轻。整体呈现高级面料质感、逼真的服装结构、整洁的缝线、可见的接缝、精致的边缘处理、自然的接缝张力、可信的面料重量、利落而真实的褶皱结构、细微的褶痕、真实的折叠感、逼真的层次深度、自然的布料堆叠、可信的扣环与金属五金结构、高品质材料触感以及精良的日常服装细节，非演出服质感，亦无廉价感。
